essence: Conducts technical search and rescue operations in challenging environments to locate and recover people in distress.

identity.title: Search and Rescue Technician
identity.summary: Operates in mountain, maritime, or urban environments using specialist equipment and techniques to save lives.

salary.notes: Specialist teams and volunteer coordinators may receive allowances or higher pay.

qualifications: Training in rope rescue, casualty care, and navigation
Experience in hazardous environments and teamwork
Strong physical fitness and decision‑making under pressure
Certifications relevant to the operating environment

lifestyle.description: On‑call and shift work with exposure to hazardous conditions; high teamwork and training demands.

habits: Uses technical rescue equipment and navigation tools
